mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM merchant_supplier_relation relation_row JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.id = relation_row.merchant_id AND merchant.deleted = 0 JOIN member_account ma ON ma.id = merchant.member_id AND ma.deleted = 0 WHERE relation_row.deleted = 0 AND relation_row.supplier_id = #{supplierId}
AND relation_row.status = #{status}

SELECT CAST(auth_row.id AS CHAR) AS id, auth_row.merchant_id AS merchantId, merchant.shop_name AS merchantName, auth_row.supplier_sku_id AS supplierSkuId, spu.spu_name AS spuName, sku.sku_name AS skuName, sku.spec_text AS specText, auth_row.authorized_price AS authorizedPrice, auth_row.allocated_stock_qty AS allocatedStockQty, auth_row.auth_status AS authStatus, relation_row.status AS relationStatus, DATE_FORMAT(auth_row.authorized_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS authorizedAt, DATE_FORMAT(auth_row.revoked_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS revokedAt, auth_row.remark AS remark, DATE_FORMAT(auth_row.updated_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS updatedAt, CAST(mg.id AS CHAR) AS merchantGoodsId, mg.sale_status AS importedSaleStatus FROM supplier_goods_authorization auth_row JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.id = auth_row.merchant_id AND merchant.deleted = 0 JOIN product_sku sku ON sku.id = auth_row.supplier_sku_id AND sku.deleted = 0 JOIN product_spu spu ON spu.id = sku.spu_id AND spu.deleted = 0 AND spu.supplier_id = auth_row.supplier_id LEFT JOIN merchant_supplier_relation relation_row ON relation_row.merchant_id = auth_row.merchant_id AND relation_row.supplier_id = auth_row.supplier_id AND relation_row.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN merchant_goods mg ON mg.merchant_id = auth_row.merchant_id AND mg.supplier_id = auth_row.supplier_id AND mg.sku_id = auth_row.supplier_sku_id AND mg.deleted = 0 WHERE auth_row.deleted = 0 AND auth_row.supplier_id = #{supplierId} ORDER BY auth_row.updated_time DESC, auth_row.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM supplier_goods_authorization auth_row JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.id = auth_row.merchant_id AND merchant.deleted = 0 JOIN product_sku sku ON sku.id = auth_row.supplier_sku_id AND sku.deleted = 0 JOIN product_spu spu ON spu.id = sku.spu_id AND spu.deleted = 0 AND spu.supplier_id = auth_row.supplier_id LEFT JOIN merchant_supplier_relation relation_row ON relation_row.merchant_id = auth_row.merchant_id AND relation_row.supplier_id = auth_row.supplier_id AND relation_row.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN merchant_goods mg ON mg.merchant_id = auth_row.merchant_id AND mg.supplier_id = auth_row.supplier_id AND mg.sku_id = auth_row.supplier_sku_id AND mg.deleted = 0 WHERE auth_row.deleted = 0 AND auth_row.supplier_id = #{supplierId}

SELECT CAST(relation_row.id AS CHAR) AS id, relation_row.supplier_id AS supplierId, supplier.supplier_name AS supplierName, ma.member_code AS supplierCode, relation_row.status AS status, DATE_FORMAT(relation_row.cooperation_start_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS cooperationStartAt, DATE_FORMAT(relation_row.cooperation_end_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS cooperationEndAt, relation_row.remark AS remark, DATE_FORMAT(relation_row.updated_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS updatedAt, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM supplier_goods_authorization auth_row WHERE auth_row.deleted = 0 AND auth_row.merchant_id = relation_row.merchant_id AND auth_row.supplier_id = relation_row.supplier_id AND auth_row.auth_status = 'ACTIVE' ) AS authorizedSkuCount, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM merchant_goods mg WHERE mg.deleted = 0 AND mg.merchant_id = relation_row.merchant_id AND mg.supplier_id = relation_row.supplier_id ) AS importedSkuCount FROM merchant_supplier_relation relation_row JOIN supplier_info supplier ON supplier.id = relation_row.supplier_id AND supplier.deleted = 0 JOIN member_account ma ON ma.id = supplier.member_id AND ma.deleted = 0 WHERE relation_row.deleted = 0 AND relation_row.merchant_id = #{merchantId} ORDER BY relation_row.updated_time DESC, relation_row.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT CAST(auth_row.id AS CHAR) AS id, auth_row.supplier_id AS supplierId, supplier.supplier_name AS supplierName, supplier_account.member_code AS supplierCode, auth_row.supplier_sku_id AS supplierSkuId, spu.spu_name AS spuName, sku.sku_name AS skuName, sku.spec_text AS specText, sku.base_price AS basePrice, sku.stock_qty AS stockQty, auth_row.allocated_stock_qty AS allocatedStockQty, auth_row.authorized_price AS authorizedPrice, auth_row.auth_status AS authStatus, relation_row.status AS relationStatus, DATE_FORMAT(auth_row.authorized_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS authorizedAt, DATE_FORMAT(auth_row.revoked_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS revokedAt, auth_row.remark AS remark, DATE_FORMAT(auth_row.updated_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS updatedAt, CAST(mg.id AS CHAR) AS merchantGoodsId, mg.sale_status AS importedSaleStatus FROM supplier_goods_authorization auth_row JOIN merchant_supplier_relation relation_row ON relation_row.merchant_id = auth_row.merchant_id AND relation_row.supplier_id = auth_row.supplier_id AND relation_row.deleted = 0 JOIN supplier_info supplier ON supplier.id = auth_row.supplier_id AND supplier.deleted = 0 JOIN member_account supplier_account ON supplier_account.id = supplier.member_id AND supplier_account.deleted = 0 JOIN product_sku sku ON sku.id = auth_row.supplier_sku_id AND sku.deleted = 0 JOIN product_spu spu ON spu.id = sku.spu_id AND spu.deleted = 0 AND spu.supplier_id = auth_row.supplier_id LEFT JOIN merchant_goods mg ON mg.merchant_id = auth_row.merchant_id AND mg.supplier_id = auth_row.supplier_id AND mg.sku_id = auth_row.supplier_sku_id AND mg.deleted = 0 WHERE auth_row.deleted = 0 AND auth_row.merchant_id = #{merchantId} ORDER BY auth_row.updated_time DESC, auth_row.id DESC

SELECT relation_row.supplier_id AS supplierId, supplier.supplier_name AS supplierName, supplier_account.member_code AS supplierCode, sku.id AS supplierSkuId, spu.spu_name AS spuName, sku.sku_name AS skuName, sku.spec_text AS specText, spu.main_image_id AS mainImageId, IFNULL(sku.stock_qty, 0) AS stockQty, sku.base_price AS basePrice, relation_row.status AS relationStatus, auth_row.auth_status AS authStatus, auth_row.authorized_price AS authorizedPrice, auth_row.allocated_stock_qty AS allocatedStockQty, CAST(mg.id AS CHAR) AS merchantGoodsId, mg.sale_status AS importedSaleStatus, DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(auth_row.updated_time, relation_row.updated_time), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS updatedAt, auth_row.remark AS remark FROM merchant_supplier_relation relation_row JOIN supplier_info supplier ON supplier.id = relation_row.supplier_id AND supplier.deleted = 0 JOIN member_account supplier_account ON supplier_account.id = supplier.member_id AND supplier_account.deleted = 0 JOIN product_sku sku ON sku.spu_id IN ( SELECT spu2.id FROM product_spu spu2 WHERE spu2.supplier_id = relation_row.supplier_id AND spu2.deleted = 0 ) AND sku.deleted = 0 JOIN product_spu spu ON spu.id = sku.spu_id AND spu.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN supplier_goods_authorization auth_row ON auth_row.supplier_id = relation_row.supplier_id AND auth_row.merchant_id = relation_row.merchant_id AND auth_row.supplier_sku_id = sku.id AND auth_row.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN merchant_goods mg ON mg.merchant_id = relation_row.merchant_id AND mg.supplier_id = relation_row.supplier_id AND mg.sku_id = sku.id AND mg.deleted = 0 WHERE relation_row.deleted = 0 AND relation_row.merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND relation_row.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY relation_row.updated_time DESC, sku.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM merchant_supplier_relation relation_row JOIN supplier_info supplier ON supplier.id = relation_row.supplier_id AND supplier.deleted = 0 JOIN member_account supplier_account ON supplier_account.id = supplier.member_id AND supplier_account.deleted = 0 JOIN product_sku sku ON sku.spu_id IN ( SELECT spu2.id FROM product_spu spu2 WHERE spu2.supplier_id = relation_row.supplier_id AND spu2.deleted = 0 ) AND sku.deleted = 0 JOIN product_spu spu ON spu.id = sku.spu_id AND spu.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN supplier_goods_authorization auth_row ON auth_row.supplier_id = relation_row.supplier_id AND auth_row.merchant_id = relation_row.merchant_id AND auth_row.supplier_sku_id = sku.id AND auth_row.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN merchant_goods mg ON mg.merchant_id = relation_row.merchant_id AND mg.supplier_id = relation_row.supplier_id AND mg.sku_id = sku.id AND mg.deleted = 0 WHERE relation_row.deleted = 0 AND relation_row.merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND relation_row.status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT auth_row.supplier_id AS supplierId, auth_row.merchant_id AS merchantId, auth_row.supplier_sku_id AS supplierSkuId, auth_row.authorized_price AS authorizedPrice, auth_row.allocated_stock_qty AS allocatedStockQty, relation_row.status AS relationStatus, auth_row.auth_status AS authStatus, sku.base_price AS basePrice FROM supplier_goods_authorization auth_row JOIN merchant_supplier_relation relation_row ON relation_row.merchant_id = auth_row.merchant_id AND relation_row.supplier_id = auth_row.supplier_id AND relation_row.deleted = 0 JOIN product_sku sku ON sku.id = auth_row.supplier_sku_id AND sku.deleted = 0 JOIN product_spu spu ON spu.id = sku.spu_id AND spu.deleted = 0 AND spu.supplier_id = auth_row.supplier_id WHERE auth_row.deleted = 0 AND auth_row.merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND auth_row.supplier_sku_id = #{supplierSkuId} LIMIT 1

SELECT supplier.id AS id, supplier.supplier_name AS supplierName, ma.member_code AS supplierCode, supplier.contact_name AS contactName, supplier.contact_phone AS contactPhone, supplier.supply_desc AS supplyDesc FROM supplier_info supplier JOIN member_account ma ON ma.id = supplier.member_id AND ma.deleted = 0 AND ma.status = 'ENABLED' WHERE supplier.deleted = 0 AND supplier.status = 'ENABLED' AND (#{keyword} IS NULL OR #{keyword} = '' OR supplier.supplier_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ma.member_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY supplier.supplier_name ASC, supplier.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
